hero.title: Rednote Viral Post Factory
hero.description: Create viral Xiaohongshu carousel posts instantly. Upload your product image, and AI generates a complete multi-page content framework with catchy titles, engaging copy, and visual suggestions—all optimized for Rednote's unique style. Perfect for brands, influencers, and marketers targeting Chinese social media.

steps.title: Upload your product image
steps.description: Provide a product photo or visual asset. The workflow analyzes it to create relevant, engaging content tailored to Xiaohongshu's audience.

steps.title: AI generates content framework
steps.description: GPT-5.2 creates a complete multi-page carousel structure with cover page, pain points, solutions, comparisons, and call-to-action—all in Rednote's viral style.

steps.title: Split into carousel pages
steps.description: The content is automatically formatted into individual pages, each with optimized text, emojis, and visual suggestions for maximum engagement.

steps.title: Generate visual slides
steps.description: Nano Banana Pro creates professional carousel images that match Xiaohongshu's aesthetic, ready for direct posting.

items.question: What is the Rednote Viral Post Factory?
items.answer: This AI workflow creates complete Xiaohongshu (Rednote) carousel posts from a single product image. It generates multi-page content frameworks with viral-style copy, emojis, and visual suggestions optimized for the platform.

items.question: What content structure does it generate?
items.answer: The workflow creates various page types including cover pages with catchy titles, pain point pages, solution pages, comparison pages, step-by-step guides, data highlights, and call-to-action pages—all following Xiaohongshu best practices.

items.question: What AI models power this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow uses GPT-5.2 for content generation and framework creation, GPT-4o for text splitting into carousel pages, and Nano Banana Pro for generating the final visual slides.

items.question: Is the content in Chinese?
items.answer: Yes, the workflow generates content in Chinese with Xiaohongshu's characteristic style—lively tone, strategic emoji usage, high information density, and clear formatting that resonates with the platform's audience.

items.question: How many pages does each carousel have?
items.answer: The number of pages is flexible and adapts to your content needs. The AI creates an appropriate structure based on the topic, typically ranging from 5-10 pages for optimal engagement.

items.question: Can I customize the content style?
items.answer: The workflow follows Xiaohongshu's proven viral content patterns, but you can adjust the generated content to match your brand voice before posting.

items.question: What input do I need to provide?
items.answer: You only need to upload a product image. The workflow handles content ideation, copywriting, page structuring, and visual generation automatically.

items.question: Can I use this for commercial purposes?
items.answer: Yes, the generated content can be used for commercial Xiaohongshu marketing, brand promotion, product launches, and influencer campaigns.
